description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a horizontally striped long-sleeve shirt and plain pants, both of which fit loosely. The shirt features a round neckline with a short placket, and the pants are straight-legged. His footwear appears to be simple, closed-toe shoes. The figure has a short hairstyle and a clean-shaven face, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance suggests casual, everyday attire suitable for an urban environment.
description: A stocky adult male in a striped long-sleeve shirt and plain pants, standing in a T-pose with short hair and simple shoes. The figure is dressed casually and has no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped shirt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the roundness of the torso, and the straight leg of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the striped pattern on the shirt, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and straight-leg pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
